The '''Trade Federation Occupation Council''', also known as just the '''Occupation Council''', was a committee of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] installed by the [[Megacorporation/Legends|megacorporation]] to oversee the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during its [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]].

==History==
The Trade Federation Occupation Council was a committee comprised several high-ranking [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]], including [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] and his [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] [[Rune Haako/Legends|Rune Haako]], [[Viff Almay]], [[Zill Kartay]], [[Kund Ekorr]] and [[Hap Brehg]]. The Occupation Council was focused on maintaining control of Theed and the Federation's occupation of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] as a whole, temporarily taking the place of the [[Naboo Royal Advisory Council/Legends|Naboo Royal Advisory Council]] while negotiations were intented to occur on the planet future.

When [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] and her staff confronted Gunray in the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|royal palace]], four members of the Occupation Council were in attendance. It was later arrested and sent to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for trial when Amidala forced Gunray to sign a treaty, effectively ending the Federation's occupation of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].
